case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. CHRISTOPHER LEE JACKSON

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-23-2018 AT 1:30 PM. THE ACTION WAS NOT FILED WITHIN THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS; 4 YEARS {ACCOUNT STATED/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT; SEE CCP SECTION 337(2)}. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; VJ: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED; (D506)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
